title: 特案厅 DSI 调查炼油厂囤油案
desc: The Department of Special Investigation (DSI) will summon PC Siam Petroleum in Surat Thani and ask them to clarify allegations of oil hoarding by the company, as the case may be treated as a special case.
desc_original: The Department of Special Investigation (DSI) will summon PC Siam Petroleum in Surat Thani and ask them to clarify allegations of oil hoarding by the company, as the case may be treated as a special case.
title_cn: 泰特案厅 DSI 介入调查素叻他尼府（Surat Thani）炼油厂囤积燃油案
summary_cn: 泰国特别调查厅（DSI）宣布将传唤位于素叻他尼府（Surat Thani）的 PC Siam Petroleum 公司。该公司涉嫌非法囤积燃油，严重扰乱市场秩序。鉴于此案社会影响重大且涉及复杂经济利益，DSI 计划将其列为“特案”进行深度侦办，以澄清相关指控。此举显示了当局打击能源领域违法行为的决心。

title: Pheu Thai plans overhaul of the SSF
desc: The Pheu Thai Party has unveiled a sweeping plan to amend the Social Security Act, promising a structural overhaul of the Social Security Fund (SSF), including a shake-up of its management board, expanded benefits and greater rights for insured workers.
desc_original: The Pheu Thai Party has unveiled a sweeping plan to amend the Social Security Act, promising a structural overhaul of the Social Security Fund (SSF), including a shake-up of its management board, expanded benefits and greater rights for insured workers.
title_cn: 泰自豪党（Pheu Thai）拟大幅修订《社会保障法》以重组社会保障基金 SSF
summary_cn: 泰国执政党为泰党（Pheu Thai）公布了一项雄心勃勃的《社会保障法》修订计划，核心在于对社会保障基金（SSF）进行结构性转型。包括重组管理委员会架构、扩大参保人员的福利待遇以及赋予投保劳工更多合法权益。此举旨在提高养老及医疗基金的管理透明度与运营效率，是关乎泰国数千万投保劳工切身利益的重大政策动向。

title: Former deputy PM Parnpree set to return as foreign adviser
desc: Former deputy prime minister and foreign minister Parnpree Bahiddha-Nukara is set to return to the Foreign Affairs Ministry as chief adviser to the minister, says a ministry source.
desc_original: Former deputy prime minister and foreign minister Parnpree Bahiddha-Nukara is set to return to the Foreign Affairs Ministry as chief adviser to the minister, says a ministry source.
title_cn: 前副总理班比（Parnpree）将重返外交部担任首席顾问
summary_cn: 据泰国外交部消息灵通人士透露，前副总理兼外交部长班比（Parnpree Bahiddha-Nukara）即将重返外交部，出任现任外交部长的首席顾问。作为泰国资深外交官，班比在去年曾突然辞职引起政坛关注，此次回归被视为政府在应对复杂国际局势及边境问题上，急需利用其丰富的经验与外交资源进行战略布局。

title: Firms eye post-Songkran flight cuts
desc: The aviation regulator expects airlines to cut flights after Songkran as fuel costs rise and travel demand weakens.
desc_original: The aviation regulator expects airlines to cut flights after Songkran as fuel costs rise and travel demand weakens.
title_cn: 受燃油成本上涨影响，航司计划在宋干节（Songkran）后削减航班数量
summary_cn: 泰国航空监管机构预计，受国际燃油成本持续上升及泼水节（Songkran）旅游旺季后出行需求减弱的双重打击，泰国各大航空公司计划在四月下旬开始削减部分国内及国际航班。此举旨在通过降低班次密度来对冲运营成本。旅客需要提前留意后续航班动态，避免受航司变更行程的影响。

title: Influencers, online ads trigger e-vaping rise, worrying parents
desc: Growing concern is mounting over influencers driving youth vaping, with many parents struggling to respond.
desc_original: Growing concern is mounting over influencers driving youth vaping, with many parents struggling to respond.
title_cn: 网红营销致泰国青少年吸电子烟成风，引发家长群体普遍担忧
summary_cn: 随着社交媒体网红营销及在线广告的泛滥，泰国青少年群体中通过非正常途径吸食电子烟的比例显著上升。尽管泰国法律严格禁止电子烟销售，但网络宣传让许多未成年人对此产生兴趣。众多家长反映难以应对这种隐蔽的线上渗透。该社会问题已引发公共卫生部门关注，呼吁加强对网络软性广告的监管。

title: 公共交通运营商计划举行抗议行动
desc: Public transport operators in major cities are under mounting pressure as surging fuel prices erode incomes and threaten services.
desc_original: Public transport operators in major cities are under mounting pressure as surging fuel prices erode incomes and threaten services.
title_cn: 泰国各大城市公共交通运营商计划因油价上涨举行抗议
summary_cn: 由于燃料价格飙升严重蚕食收入并威胁到正常服务，泰国各大城市的公共交通运营商正面临巨大的生存压力。相关从业者计划发起抗议行动，要求政府关注运营成本大幅上升的困境。此次动向可能影响曼谷及其他主要城市的出行服务，建议在泰人员关注后续罢工或抗议对交通的影响。

title: New govt off to a bumpy start
desc: There will be no honeymoon period for the incoming administration of Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul, with academics warning the government has only a narrow window to prove it can manage a deepening energy and cost-of-living crisis -- or risk a steep fall in public support.
desc_original: There will be no honeymoon period for the incoming administration of Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul, with academics warning the government has only a narrow window to prove it can manage a deepening energy and cost-of-living crisis -- or risk a steep fall in public support.
title_cn: 阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）新政府上任伊始面临重重挑战
summary_cn: 新任总理阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）领导的政府将没有“蜜月期”。学者警告说，该届政府证明其管理日益严重的能源和生活成本危机能力的窗口期非常窄，否则将面临公众支持率的大幅下跌。在经济压力巨大的背景下，新政府能否迅速出台有效政策解决民生问题成为政界关注焦点。

title: Thai diesel prices to rise another 2.80 baht/litre
desc: Diesel prices will rise another 2.80 baht a litre at 5am on Sunday as the state Oil Fuel Fund will cut its diesel price subsidy.
desc_original: Diesel prices will rise another 2.80 baht a litre at 5am on Sunday as the state Oil Fuel Fund will cut its diesel price subsidy.
title_cn: 周日早晨起泰国柴油价格每升再涨2.80泰铢
summary_cn: 由于泰国国家石油基金（Oil Fuel Fund）决定削减柴油价格补贴，从周日（4月5日）凌晨5时起，柴油零售价将上调2.80泰铢/升。此次价格上调将直接增加物流成本和生活支出，建议在泰车主及相关运输企业提前做好准备，并关注后续能源价格波动趋势。

title: Bottled drinking water placed on price-control list
desc: The government has added bottled drinking water and seasoning sauces to its price-control list, along with plastic pellets, in order to prevent undue price increases in light of cost pressures arising from the Middle East war.
desc_original: The government has added bottled drinking water and seasoning sauces to its price-control list, along with plastic pellets, in order to prevent undue price increases in light of cost pressures arising from the Middle East war.
title_cn: 泰国政府将瓶装饮用水列入价格管控清单
summary_cn: 为应对中东战争引发的成本压力并防止物价无理上涨，泰国政府已正式将瓶装饮用水、调味酱以及塑料颗粒列入价格管控清单。通过此举，政府相关部门将能够更有效地监测并限制此类生活必需品的最高售价，以减轻民众在当前全球动荡局势下的生活负担。

title: ‘Crypto coach’ facing charges in B30-million fraud
desc: Police have arrested a self-styled cryptocurrency coach and her accomplice accused of luring the public into investing in a fraudulent cryptocurrency scheme, with promises of high returns but blocked withdrawals, causing losses of about 30 million baht.
desc_original: Police have arrested a self-styled cryptocurrency coach and her accomplice accused of luring the public into investing in a fraudulent cryptocurrency scheme, with promises of high returns but blocked withdrawals, causing losses of about 30 million baht.
title_cn: “加密货币导师”涉3000万泰铢诈骗案被捕
summary_cn: 泰国警方逮捕了一名自封为“加密货币导师”及其同伙，两人被控通过虚假的加密货币投资计划诱骗公众。该骗局承诺高额回报，但随后封锁提款支出，造成总额约3000万泰铢的损失。警方提醒广大在泰人员理性理财，警惕各类打着区块链幌子的高收益理财陷阱。

title: Probe refiners, don’t beg for donations, says Democrats’ Korn
desc: Democrat Party deputy leader Korn Chatikavanij has urged the government to investigate refinery profits rather than asking operators to donate excess earnings to help ease the economic burden from soaring energy costs.
desc_original: Democrat Party deputy leader Korn Chatikavanij has urge the government to investigate refinery profits rather than asking operators to donate excess earnings to help ease the economic burden from soaring energy costs.
title_cn: 民主党副党首功·察迪甲瓦尼（Korn Chatikavanij）呼吁政府调查炼油利润，而非请求捐款
summary_cn: 泰国民主党（Democrat Party）副党首功·察迪甲瓦尼（Korn Chatikavanij）敦促政府应着手调查国内炼油企业的盈利状况，而非仅仅请求运营商捐出多余收益。他指出，在能源价格飙升导致经济负担加重的背景下，政府应通过制度化手段核查炼油利润是否合理，以从根本上缓解民生压力，确保能源市场的公平与透明。

title: Disaster declared in three northern Thai provinces
desc: Three provinces in northern Thailand — Chiang Mai, Lamphun and Phayao — have been declared emergency disaster zones after days of hazardous air quality, enabling provincial governors to disburse emergency funds to address the situation.
desc_original: Three provinces in northern Thailand — Chiang Mai, Lamphun and Phayao — have been declared emergency disaster zones after days of hazardous air quality, enabling provincial governors to disburse emergency funds to address the situation.
title_cn: 泰北清迈（Chiang Mai）等三府因空气污染进入灾害紧急状态
summary_cn: 由于连续多日遭遇严重的空气污染（PM2.5），泰国北部的清迈府（Chiang Mai）、南奔府（Lamphun）和帕府（Phayao）已被正式宣布为紧急灾难区。该声明授权各府府尹动用紧急救灾预算，以采取更迅速的措施应对有害空气质量，包括雾霾治理及相关医疗救援。此举反映了泰北每年雾霾季对民众健康的严重威胁。

title: Molam, the heartbeat of Isan migrants
desc: Molam, a centuries-old musical tradition from northeastern Thailand (Isan) and the surrounding region, is finding firmer footing in Bangkok, where people who call Isan home make up the city’s largest migrant community.
desc_original: Molam, a centuries-old musical tradition from northeastern Thailand (Isan) and the surrounding region, is finding firmer footing in Bangkok, where people who call Isan home make up the city’s largest migrant community.
title_cn: 莫兰歌舞（Molam）：曼谷伊森（Isan）移民的精神寄托
summary_cn: 源自泰国东北部（Isan，伊森地区）的传统艺术“莫兰歌舞”（Molam）拥有数百年历史。随着大量东北部民众涌入曼谷寻找工作，作为该市最大的移居社区群体，他们也将这种充满乡土气息的音乐带入了首都。如今，莫兰不仅在曼谷站稳了脚跟，更成为了当地伊森打工人情感联结、缓解思乡情结的重要文化载体。

title: No, this is not a New Normal
desc: “This is the New Normal” is how spokesperson for the Centre for Monitoring the Situation in the Middle East, Nuttaa Mahattana, has characterised Thailand’s current struggle with soaring fuel and commodities prices triggered by the war in the Middle East.
desc_original: “This is the New Normal” is how spokesperson for the Centre for Monitoring the Situation in the Middle East, Nuttaa Mahattana, has characterised Thailand’s current struggle with soaring fuel and commodities prices triggered by the war in the Middle East.
title_cn: 这不应是“新常态”：专家谈泰国受中东局势影响的物价危机
summary_cn: 中东冲突监测与管理中心发言人努塔（Nuttaa Mahattana）在评论中提到，由于中东战争引发的燃料和商品价格持续飙升，泰国正面临严峻的经济挑战。尽管有人将这种高通胀状态描述为“新常态”，但舆论普遍反思，政府不应默认生活成本高涨，而应采取更积极的宏观策略来应对国际局势波动对国内民生的冲击。

title: 应对能源价格波动：泰国内政部下令严控农资价格、推广节能
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，4月3日，泰国内政部次长兼中东冲突检测与管理中心主任阿努西表示，已签署最高紧急指令下发至全国各府尹，要求从四个方面全面应对各类群体所受影响...
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，4月3日，泰国内政部次长兼中东冲突检测与管理中心主任阿努西表示，已签署最高紧急指令下发至全国各府尹，要求从四个方面全面应对各类群体所受影响...
title_cn: 应对能源波动：泰国内政部下令全国各府尹严控农资价格与推广节能
summary_cn: 泰国内政部次长安努西针对中东冲突带来的能源压力，向全国府尹下发最高紧急指令，旨在从四个维度减轻民生负担。重点措施包括：严厉打击农资（化肥、饲料）哄抬物价行为，防止农业生产成本失控；在各级行政机构和民间推广节能方案；同时通过基层网络加强对受能源价格上涨影响群体的救助，确保社会稳定。

title_cn: 应对油价飙升！Grab泰国推电动车租赁计划，日租800泰铢起
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月4日，据泰媒报道，Grab泰国公司宣布加速推进电动汽车应用项目，通过租赁与分期购车模式降低司机使用电动车的门槛...
summary_cn: Grab泰国（Grab Thailand）公司为应对油价高涨，宣布推出低门槛电动汽车（EV）推进项目。该计划针对司机提供电动车租赁与分期购车方案，租金最低每日800泰铢（800 Baht）。此举旨在降低司机的能源成本，同时响应泰国政府的绿色出行政策，加速交通运输业的电气化转型，对在泰网约车从业者及能源市场有显著影响。

title_cn: 中国稳居泰国最大客源国！2026年首季度游客达931万人次
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月4日，据泰媒报道，截至3月31日，泰国2026年共接待外国游客931万人次。其中，前五大客源市场分别为：中国149万人次...
summary_cn: 据泰国旅游部门最新数据，截止2026年3月31日，泰国今年已累计接待外国游客达931万人次。中国（China）以149万人次稳居榜首，持续成为泰国旅游业的核心动力。尽管复苏趋势明显，但泰国旅游政策正经历转型，从单纯追求游客数量转向注重旅游附加值与服务质量，以应对日益复杂的全球经济环境挑战。

title_cn: 芭提雅（Pattaya）发生摩托车事故，一名65岁英国籍男子不幸身亡
desc_original: 65-year-old British man dies in Pattaya motorcycle crash...
summary_cn: 在芭提雅（Pattaya）发生了一起致命的交通意外，一名65岁的英国（British）籍男子在驾驶摩托车时发生车祸，不幸当场身亡。目前当地警方正在调查事故发生的具体地点及原因。此事件再次提醒在泰外籍人士注意驾驶安全，尤其是长途驾驶或通过危险路段时需保持警惕，并确保合法持证及佩戴安全头盔。

title_cn: 受中东冲突影响，泰国入境市场以色列客群遭波及
desc_original: Middle Eastern markets, particularly Israeli arrivals, have been hit the hardest by the Gulf war...
summary_cn: 随着中东冲突持续升级，泰国旅游市场受到连带冲击。特别是来自中东地区的客源，尤其是以色列（Israel）游客订单大幅减少，成为受影响最严重的客源市场。泰国经济分析指出，海湾冲突的不确定性可能影响泰国年度旅游创收目标，相关部门正关注形势发展，并计划针对其他潜在市场进行多元化引流以弥补损失。

title_cn: 泰国酷热来袭！多地气温飙升至42℃，需防范PM2.5粉尘
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月4日，据泰媒报道，泰国气象局发布未来24小时天气预报称...
summary_cn: 泰国气象局发布天气预报，预计未来24小时内全国多地将迎来极端高温天气，最高气温可能攀升至42摄氏度（42℃）。同时，部分地区面临超标的PM2.5粉尘污染。建议在泰民众及游客减少户外活动，谨防热射病与呼吸道疾病，出门佩戴防护口罩。此轮热浪正值泰国暑期，需密切关注气象预警和空气质量监测。

summary_cn: 泰国民航局（CAAT）最新发布，受此前局势影响的中东航线目前已有一半以上恢复正常运营。针对民众关心的国内票价问题，民航局表示已加强监控，确保购票高峰期价格仍处于政府规定的合理上限区间内。此举有助于稳定在泰居民及游客的出行预期，保障航空客运市场的健康有序。

title: 泰国能源部警告：国家正面临有史以来最严重的能源危机

title: 民众感叹“呼吸致死”，泰议员积极推动《清洁空气法》应对PM2.5危机
desc: MP pushes back against Clean Air Bill as Thais are 'breathing dust to death' Legacy Thai netizens...
desc_original: MP pushes back against Clean Air Bill as Thais are 'breathing dust to death' Legacy Thai netizens...

title: 在霍尔木兹海峡遭袭击的泰国货轮上发现人类遗骸
desc_original: Human remains were found within the affected area of the ​vessel ⁠MV Mayuree Naree in the Strait of ​Hormuz, which was attacked last month during ⁠the Middle East conflict, ⁠Thailand's Precious Shipping ​reported on ​Friday.
title_cn: 在霍尔木兹海峡 Strait of Hormuz 遭袭击的泰国货轮 MV Mayuree Naree 号上发现人类遗骸
summary_cn: 泰国珍宝航运公司（Precious Shipping）周五报告称，上个月在中东冲突中遭到袭击的泰国籍货轮“MV Mayuree Naree”号，在霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）受损区域内发现了人类遗骸。这艘船曾是中东局势升级背景下受攻击的多艘商船之一，目前打捞及相关核实工作正在进行中。

title: Unsafe levels of smog blanket 37 provinces, Mae Hong Son’s Pai district worst hit
desc_original: Toxic haze remains at critical levels across large parts of the country, with PM2.5 concentrations exceeding safety standards in 37 provinces, the Pollution Control Department (PCD) reported on Friday.
title_cn: 泰国37府雾霾爆表，夜丰颂府 Mae Hong Son 拜县 Pai 灾情最重
summary_cn: 泰国污染控制厅（PCD）周五通报，剧毒烟霾仍笼罩全国大部分地区，共有37个府的PM2.5浓度超过安全标准。其中，夜丰颂府（Mae Hong Son）的旅游胜地拜县（Pai）受灾最为严重，由于空气质量达危急水平，严重威胁居民健康和旅游业，相关机构呼吁民众加强防护措施。

title: Thai regulator tightens market oversight to curb 'grey capital'
desc_original: Thailand’s ⁠Securities and Exchange ​Commission (SEC) is stepping up measures ​to curb ​grey capital, mule accounts and investment scams, calling it a national priority.
title_cn: 泰国证监会 SEC 加强市场监管，严厉打击“灰色资本”及傀儡账户
summary_cn: 泰国证券交易委员会（SEC）正全面升级监管手段，旨在遏制非法“灰色资本”、清除傀儡账户及打击投资诈骗。官方已将此项行动提升至国家优先任务高度，旨在通过强化审计和资本溯源调查，维护金融市场秩序并保护投资者利益，这也是泰国近期整顿金融环境的核心举措。

title: Thai Airways stresses 2 power-bank limit per passenger
desc_original: Thai Airways International reminds passengers of a new regulation that permits each passenger to carry up to two power banks with no permission to use or charge them on board.
title_cn: 泰国航空 Thai Airways 再次强调：每位乘客限带2个充电宝，禁止机上充电
summary_cn: 泰国国际航空（Thai Airways International）向旅客发布安全提醒，重申最新的乘机规定：每名乘客限携带最多2个符合容量标准的充电宝（移动电源），且严格禁止在飞机航行过程中使用充电宝或为其充电，以防电池因过度发热引发火灾隐患，保障飞行安全。

title: Thai central bank chief says no drastic policy adjustment needed at the moment
desc_original: Thailand's central bank chief ​said there was no need for a drastic ​monetary policy adjustment at the moment, ​despite expectations of a rise in inflation driven by higher oil prices amid the war in the Middle East.
title_cn: 泰国央行行长：暂无必要大幅调整货币政策，尽管中东局势推高通胀预期
summary_cn: 泰国中央银行行长表示，目前泰国尚无必要进行剧烈的货币政策调整。虽然中东局势导致国际油价上涨并引发通胀升温预期，但央行认为现有货币政策仍能支撑国内经济复苏。央行将持续监控大宗商品价格波动对泰铢及通货膨胀的影响，保持政策的缓和空间。

title: 攀牙荣登全球“旅行者点评奖”第一名！
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月2日，泰国安达曼海岸边的美丽天堂“攀牙”于近日力压全球众多知名城市，拿下了Booking.com“旅行者点评奖”（Traveller Review Awards 2026）第一名。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月2日，泰国安达曼海岸边的美丽天堂“攀牙”于近日力压全球众多知名城市，拿下了Booking.com“旅行者点评奖”（Traveller Review Awards 2026）第一名。
title_cn: 泰国攀牙府（Phang Nga）荣登Booking.com全球“旅行者点评奖”榜首
summary_cn: 位于泰国安达曼海岸的攀牙府（Phang Nga）在Booking.com发布的“2026年旅行者点评奖”（Traveller Review Awards 2026）中脱颖而出，击败全球多个知名旅游目的地，夺得世界第一名。攀牙府以其自然风光和优质的服务体验获得全球游客高度认可，此次获奖将进一步提升泰国在国际高端旅游市场的影响力，吸引更多高净值游客到访该地区。

title: 揭露“侵占者天堂”：普吉岛自由海滩（Freedom Beach）遭长期侵占
desc_original: A secluded strip of sand cradled by forested hills, Freedom Beach in Phuket has long been prized for its natural beauty -- clear waters, dense greenery and a tranquillity cherished by local communities who lived and worked in harmony with the land.
title_cn: 普吉岛（Phuket）自由海滩遭非法侵占，揭开天堂背后的土地权属争议
summary_cn: 普吉岛（Phuket）著名的自由海滩（Freedom Beach）长期以来因清澈海水和原始森林深受喜爱。然而，这片原本与社区和谐共存的自然天堂近期被揭露存在严重的非法侵占问题。由于森林丘陵环绕地势隐秘，土地权属和非法开发行为引发社会关注，暴露出泰国旅游景区公共土地保护面临的挑战。

title: High hopes for cancer control
desc_original: The Ministry of Public Health is moving to draft Thailand's first Cancer Control Act, raising hopes for improved access to treatment, stronger prevention and greater equity in medical resources as the country faces a growing cancer burden and mounting healthcare costs.
title_cn: 泰国拟起草首部《癌症控制法》，提升医疗资源公平性及防治水平
summary_cn: 泰国卫生部（Ministry of Public Health）正着手起草该国首部《癌症控制法》。随着癌症负担加重且医疗成本攀升，该法案旨在通过法律手段提高患者获取治疗的机会，加强预防措施，并确保医疗资源在全国范围内的公平分配。这对长期在泰居住者的医疗保障及公共卫生政策具有深远意义。

title: PP rejects ethics breach over reforms
desc_original: The People's Party (PP) insists it has a right to propose laws, even if they turn out to be unpopular.
title_cn: 泰国民众党（People's Party）否认修法违反伦理，坚持拥有提案权
summary_cn: 针对外界对其改革提案违反伦理规范的指控，泰国民众党（People's Party）予以坚决否认。该党强调，作为立法机构成员，其有权根据政治主张提出法律修正案，即便这些方案在当前形势下可能引起争议或是不够“流行”。反映了泰国当前执政党与反对党之间关于立法边界的激烈博弈。

title: Governors can declare disaster sites
desc_original: Provincial governors have the authority to declare their provinces disaster zones amid rising levels of air pollution, says Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul.
title_cn: 阿努廷（Anutin）总理：空气污染严重地区，府尹有权宣布进入紧急灾难状态
summary_cn: 泰国副总理兼内政部长阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）明确，面对日益严重的空气污染（如PM2.5问题），各府府尹拥有法定职权可直接将所属地区宣布为灾难区域。此举将授权地方政府动用紧急预算和资源进行应对。对曼谷、清迈等雾霾高发区的居民和游客具有重要的健康和出行警示意义。

title: PM axes Phiphat as his war centre head
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul will appoint Ekniti Nitithanprapas to head the Middle East war monitoring centre, replacing Phiphat Ratchakitprakarn, in a move aimed at easing public concern.
title_cn: 阿努廷（Anutin）总理更换撤侨中心负责人，由埃尼（Ekniti）接替披帕（Phiphat）
summary_cn: 为了平息公众疑虑并优化中东冲突应对效率，阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）总理决定调整中东战争监控中心负责人人选。埃尼（Ekniti Nitithanprapas）将接替披帕（Phiphat Ratchakitprakarn）执掌该中心，负责监控地区局势并协调受影响的在泰人员或撤侨事务。此举反映出泰国政府对近期地缘政治风险对本国公民影响的高度关注。

title: 泰国商用电动车(EV)成发展重点，BEV销量预计突破12万辆
desc: Thailand's battery electric vehicle (BEV) market is expected to gain significant momentum this year, with sales projected to surpass 120,000 units partially due to soaring oil prices, says the Electric Vehicle Association of Thailand (EVAT).
desc_original: Thailand's battery electric vehicle (BEV) market is expected to gain significant momentum this year, with sales projected to surpass 120,000 units partially due to soaring oil prices, says the Electric Vehicle Association of Thailand (EVAT).
title_cn: 商用电动车将助推泰国电动汽车市场繁荣，销量预计突破12万辆
summary_cn: 泰国电动汽车协会（EVAT）表示，受国际油价飙升影响，泰国电池驱动电动汽车（BEV）市场今年将强劲增长。预计全年销量将突破12万辆。目前，商用电动车被视为推动增长的关键驱动力，政府计划通过政策引导和基建配套，进一步巩固泰国作为区域电动汽车制造中心的地位。

title: 泰国能源部长承诺推行更公平的成品油定价机制
desc: Energy Minister Akanat Promphan has pledged to overhaul the country's refinery margin mechanism to ensure fairer pricing for consumers.
desc_original: Energy Minister Akanat Promphan has pledged to overhaul the country's refinery margin mechanism to ensure fairer pricing for consumers.
title_cn: 能源部长阿卡纳（Akanat Promphan）承诺改革炼油利润机制以确保油价公平
summary_cn: 泰国能源部长阿卡纳（Akanat Promphan）近期承诺将对国家的炼油利润机制进行彻底审查和改革，旨在解决目前油价偏高的问题，确保消费者能支付更公平的燃油价格。此举被视为政府缓解民众生活负担、平抑通胀的重要步骤，预计将对国内油气零售市场产生直接影响。

title: Stark造假案追踪：证监会对德勤审计师处以6年禁职令
desc: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has intensified enforcement in the high-profile accounting scandal of Stark Corp, filing a criminal complaint and imposing a six-year ban on an auditor from Deloitte for serious professional misconduct.
desc_original: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has intensified enforcement in the high-profile accounting scandal of Stark Corp, filing a criminal complaint and imposing a six-year ban on an auditor from Deloitte for serious professional misconduct.
title_cn: Stark Corp会计丑闻升级：证监会禁业德勤（Deloitte）审计师6年
summary_cn: 针对备受关注的Stark Corp大型会计造假丑闻，泰国证券交易委员会（SEC）加大了执法力度。SEC已提起刑事通报，并对德勤（Deloitte）的一名审计师实施为期六年的执业禁令。该审计师由于在审计过程中存在严重的专业失职，被认定应对财报造假负有责任。此案正进一步整顿泰国资本市场的治理秩序。

title: 雾霾笼罩，清迈宋干节旅游预期转淡
desc: Northern tourism operators expect a poor showing during the Songkran holiday as the region remains choked by smog, amid weak spending attributed to the war in the Middle East and the subsequent oil shock.
desc_original: Northern tourism operators expect a poor showing during the Songkran holiday as the region remains choked by smog, amid weak spending attributed to the war in the Middle East and the subsequent oil shock.
title_cn: 空气污染阴影笼罩清迈（Chiang Mai），宋干节（Songkran）旅游预定遇冷
summary_cn: 清迈及泰国北部旅游业者对即将到来的宋干节表示悲观。受严重的雾霾（PM2.5）污染影响，游客预定量不及预期。此外，受中东地缘政治局势导致的高油价和消费疲软影响，游客消费意愿大幅下降。清迈目前的空气质量问题已成为制约传统旅游胜地复苏的首要阻碍。

title: JSCCIB 下调泰国年度 GDP 增长预期至 1.2%-1.6%
desc: The Joint Standing Committee on Commerce, Industry and Banking (JSCCIB) has lowered its Thai GDP growth forecast to a range of 1.2-1.6%, citing the ongoing energy crisis triggered by war in the Middle East. The previous projection was 1.6-2.0%.
desc_original: The Joint Standing Committee on Commerce, Industry and Banking (JSCCIB) has lowered its Thai GDP growth forecast to a range of 1.2-1.6%, citing the ongoing energy crisis triggered by war in the Middle East. The previous projection was 1.6-2.0%.
title_cn: 泰联办（JSCCIB）因中东战火及能源危机大幅下调泰国GDP增长预测
summary_cn: 泰国商会、工业联合会及银行公会联合委员会（JSCCIB）宣布将2026年泰国GDP增长预期由此前的1.6-2.0%下调至1.2-1.6%。此次下修主因中东战争引发的能源危机构成了严重的通胀压力，削弱了泰国的复苏动力。JSCCIB 呼吁企业和个人为长期的低增长与能源价格高企做好准备。

title: Thai diesel prices rise another 3.50 baht
desc: Diesel prices will rise another 3.50 baht a litre to 44.24 baht — 48% higher than a month ago — at service stations across Thailand on Thursday morning.
desc_original: Diesel prices will rise another 3.50 baht a litre to 44.24 baht — 48% higher than a month ago — at service stations across Thailand on Thursday morning.
title_cn: 泰国柴油价格再次上涨3.50泰铢
summary_cn: 自4月2日（周四）上午起，泰国全国加油站的柴油价格将再次每升上涨3.50泰铢，调价后达到44.24泰铢。这一价格在短短一个月内累计上涨了48%。受国际局势及燃油基金补贴压力影响，燃料成本的大幅攀升已直接冲击物流及生活成本，反映出泰国能源物价压力的加剧。

title: Banks raise reserves to deal with effects of war
desc: Thai banks are increasing their loan-loss reserves to prepare for the impact of a prolonged war in the Middle East and to support a growing number of vulnerable customers.
desc_original: Thai banks are increasing their loan-loss reserves to prepare for the impact of a prolonged war in the Middle East and to support a growing number of vulnerable customers.
title_cn: 未雨绸缪！泰国银行业增加坏账准备金以抵御中东冲突冲击
summary_cn: 由于中东冲突持续时间超预期，泰国各商业银行正在提高贷款损失准备金。此举旨在应对外部局势引发的经济波动，并为受通胀和成本上升影响的脆弱客户群提供更多支持。银行界普遍担忧战争导致的能源危机可能进一步削弱借款人的还款能力，提前筑牢金融护城河。

title: Power bills to rise only 1.8%
desc: Electricity tariffs in Thailand will rise by only 1.8% for the May-August period, the Energy Regulatory Commission (ERC) announced on Wednesday.
desc_original: Electricity tariffs in Thailand will rise by only 1.8% for the May-August period, the Energy Regulatory Commission (ERC) announced on Wednesday.
title_cn: 泰国5至8月电费微调，涨幅控制在1.8%
summary_cn: 泰国能源监管委员会（ERC）近日宣布，在2026年5月至8月的计费周期内，电费基准将仅上调1.8%。这一涨幅远低于市场此前对能源成本危机导致的飙升预期，显示出政府试图在国际燃料价格波动期间缓解民众的生活负担，保持国内工商业的运营成本相对稳定。

title: Fuel crisis powers surge in EV interest in Asia
desc: Motorists across the Asia-Pacific region are switching to electric vehicles at a rapid pace, as rising fuel costs due to the Middle East war force consumers and companies ​to reconsider their reliance on petrol and diesel vehicles.
desc_original: Motorists across the Asia-Pacific region are switching to electric vehicles at a rapid pace, as rising fuel costs due to the Middle East war force consumers and companies ​to reconsider their reliance on petrol and diesel vehicles.
title_cn: 燃料危机加速亚洲电动汽车（EV）普及
summary_cn: 由于中东局势导致燃油价格居高不下，亚太地区的车主正加速转向电动汽车。日益沉重的燃油支成本迫使个人消费者和企业重新考虑对汽柴油车的依赖。这一趋势不仅在泰国明显，在整个亚洲范围内都掀起了从传统内燃机向新能源汽车转变的绿色转型浪潮。

title: Thailand Post the latest to add fuel surcharge
desc: Thailand Post plans to impose a fuel surcharge of 3 baht per item on domestic Express Mail Service (EMS) and e-CoPost services from April 16, citing higher fuel costs.
desc_original: Thailand Post plans to impose a fuel surcharge of 3 baht per item on domestic Express Mail Service (EMS) and e-CoPost services from April 16, citing higher fuel costs.
title_cn: 泰国邮政（Thailand Post）将于4月16日起加收3泰铢燃油附加费
summary_cn: 受持续上涨的燃油成本影响，泰国邮政计划从4月16日起，对国内特快专递服务（EMS）和e-CoPost服务每件加收3泰铢的燃油附加费。这是继多家物流公司后泰邮宣布的调价措施。居民及电商商家需注意寄送成本的变动，这反映了能源价格上涨对泰国基础物流体系的连锁反应。

title: 清迈山间救火志愿者因体力不支不幸殉职
desc_original: CHIANG MAI - A local volunteer battling wildfires in this northern province was found dead on a mountain in Mae Rim district on Wednesday after going missing from his group the night before.
summary_cn: 在清迈府（Chiang Mai）北部山区参与灭火行动的一名当地志愿消防员，在工作过程中重度疲劳并与队伍失去联系。周三，搜救人员在美林县（Mae Rim）的山上发现了他的遗体。目前泰北正处于山火高发季，由于地形复杂且持续高温，救火工作异常艰巨。该事件再次引发了社会对救火志愿者装备和后勤保障的关注。
title_cn: 清迈山间救火志愿者因体力不支不幸殉职

title: 泰国主流商会下调2026年GDP增长预期至1.2%-1.6%
desc_original: Thailand's economy is expected to ​grow by 1.2% to 1.6% this year, a leading business group said on Wednesday, cutting its outlook from ​an
summary_cn: 泰国领先的商业团体（JSCCIB）周三宣布，将2026年泰国年度GDP增长预测从之前的区间下调至1.2%至1.6%。此次修正反映出对出口增长放缓、家庭债务高企以及全球经济不确定性的担忧。商会呼吁政府尽快出台精准的经济刺激措施以应对低增长风险，当前泰国的复苏步伐在东南亚国家中依然处于偏低水平。
title_cn: 泰国主流商会下调2026年GDP增长预期至1.2%-1.6%

title: 曼谷国际车展开幕：燃油价格震荡后的市场博弈
desc_original: The Bangkok International Motor Show still knows how to stage desire. This year’s edition, running from March 25 to April 5 at IMPACT Challenger, has all the familiar pleasures intact...
summary_cn: 本届曼谷国际车展（BIMS）在暖武里府 IMPACT Challenger 展馆如期举办，活动将持续至4月5日。尽管近期面临燃油价格波动的巨大压力，车展依然吸引了大量消费者。现场新能源汽车（EV）占据了显著地位，各大厂商纷纷推出购车优惠。在燃油成本飙升的市场背景下，消费者的兴趣正快速从内燃机汽车转向更为经济的混动及纯电车型。
title_cn: 曼谷国际车展开幕：燃油价格震荡后的市场博弈

title: 泰总理阿努廷：内阁成员需凭KPI说话，不胜任者将面临劝退
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月1日上午，泰国总理兼内政部长、泰自豪党党魁阿努廷就新一届内阁（被称为“阿努廷2.0内阁”）的组建情况接受媒体采访。他明确表示，部长职位不是用来试工的地方。接下来，他将对每位部长的工作进行绩效考核（KPI），如果谁干得不好、达不到目标，他有权随时调整人事，确保政府高效运转。
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）在针对其“2.0内阁”发表声明时强调，政府高级职位不是实习场所。他将对各部部长引入KPI绩效考评机制，表现不佳或无法达成政策目标的官员将面临人事调整。此举被视为执政党加强行政效能、兑现竞选承诺的强硬信号。阿努廷目前兼任内政部长，其内阁重组后的效率成为公众关注焦点。
title_cn: 泰总理阿努廷：内阁成员需凭KPI说话，不胜任者将面临劝退

title: 曼谷将承办2026首届欧歌赛亚洲版
desc_original: This is not an April Fool's Day joke. Bangkok has been announced as the host city of the inaugural Eurovision Song Contest Asia 2026.
summary_cn: 这不是愚人节玩笑，曼谷已正式被定为2026年首届“欧歌赛亚洲版”（Eurovision Song Contest Asia）的举办城市。作为全球最知名的歌唱比赛首次落户亚洲，此举旨在促进亚洲各国间的文化交流与艺术竞技。该活动预计将吸引大量国际游客和媒体关注，极大地提升曼谷作为亚洲娱乐及活动枢纽的国际地位。
title_cn: 曼谷将承办2026首届欧歌赛亚洲版
曼谷一汽车冲进便利店造成8人受伤，包含2名德国游客
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月31日约22点50分，泰国曼谷Chanasongkram警察局接到报警称，Phra Nakhon区Wat Bowonniwet Vihara寺旁的Bang Lamphu环岛附近，有一辆汽车冲进了便利店里。造成现场8人受伤，包括2名德国人和6名泰国人。
summary_cn: 3月31日晚约22:50，曼谷帕那空区（Phra Nakhon）发生一起严重交通事故。一辆汽车冲入僧王寺（Wat Bowonniwet Vihara）旁邦兰铺（Bang Lamphu）环岛附近的一家便利店。事故导致8人受伤，伤者包括2名德国籍游客及6名泰国居民。目前警方已介入调查事故原因，提醒游客在夜间出行注意交通安全状况。

title_cn: 卡地亚女性创业家奖（Cartier Women's Initiative）首次移师曼谷举办
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月1日，“卡地亚女性创业家奖”正式揭晓了今年的30名获奖者名单，同时宣布将于6月10日在曼谷举办全球颁奖典礼，这是该活动首次在东南亚举办。
summary_cn: “卡地亚女性创业家奖”正式公布本年度30名全球获奖者名单，并宣布将于6月10日在曼谷举行全球颁奖典礼。这是该知名奖项创办以来首次在东南亚地区举办，彰显了曼谷在全球商业舞台及支持女性领导力方面的地位提升。该活动旨在表彰通过经营企业产生可持续社会影响力的女性企业家。

title_cn: 中国男子称遭诈骗团伙追杀，在暖武里（Nonthaburi）获泰籍女子救助
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月1日，泰国暖武里府Bang Yai警察局透露，3月30日凌晨，一名泰国女子偶遇一名惊慌失措的中国男子向其求助，该男子自称被中国人的诈骗团伙从柬埔寨骗来泰国并遭到追杀。
summary_cn: 3月30日凌晨，一名泰国女子在暖武里府挽艾县（Bang Yai）发现一名求助的中国籍男子。该男子称其原本被电诈团伙从柬埔寨骗至泰国，后脱逃并遭到同胞跨国追杀，情绪极度恐慌。泰籍女子随后协助其报警。此案再次暴露打击跨境跨国电信诈骗及相关暴力犯罪的紧迫性，目前泰国警方已展开深度调查。

title: 尚泰零售 CRC 与韩国 Emart 合作，引进杂货品牌 No Brand 进入泰国
desc: SET-listed Central Retail Corporation (CRC) has partnered with Emart Inc, a South Korean retailer, to launch 'No Brand' grocery stores in Thailand.
desc_original: SET-listed Central Retail Corporation (CRC) has partnered with Emart Inc, a South Korean retailer, to launch 'No Brand' grocery stores in Thailand.
summary_cn: 泰国上市零售巨头尚泰零售集团（Central Retail Corporation，简称 CRC）已宣布与韩国最大零售商 Emart 旗下品牌展开战略合作，计划在该国推出名为“No Brand”的平价杂货连锁店。此举标志着 CRC 正在通过引入高质量且极具价格竞争力的韩国品牌来多元化其零售矩阵，以满足泰国消费者日益增长的性价比需求。
title_cn: 尚泰零售 CRC 与韩国 Emart 合作，引进杂货品牌 No Brand 进入泰国

title: 泰燃油基金枯竭，阿努廷 Anutin 政府拟向商行申请贷款稳物价
desc: Authorities are preparing to seek a loan from commercial banks to stabilise Thailand's fast-depleting Oil Fuel Fund, following the announcement of the new cabinet under Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul.
desc_original: Authorities are preparing to seek a loan from commercial banks to stabilise Thailand's fast-depleting Oil Fuel Fund, following the announcement of the new cabinet under Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul.
summary_cn: 随着阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）新内阁组建完毕，泰国当局正计划向商业银行申请贷款，以维持即将耗尽的国家燃油基金。该基金长期用于补贴零售燃油价格，以减轻民众生活负担。面对全球能源价格波动与基金流动性危机，此次贷款旨在稳定国内燃料成本，避免通胀剧烈波动对民生造成直接冲击。
title_cn: 泰燃油基金枯竭，阿努廷 Anutin 政府拟向商行申请贷款稳物价

title: 受中东冲突博弈影响，泰国今年食品出口预计将下跌 7%
desc: Food exports are projected to decline by 7.3% year-on-year to 1.4 trillion baht this year, possibly hitting their lowest level in five years due to Middle East conflicts, say industry groups.
desc_original: Food exports are projected to decline by 7.3% year-on-year to 1.4 trillion baht this year, possibly hitting their lowest level in five years due to Middle East conflicts, say industry groups.
summary_cn: 泰国行业组织预测，受中东地区局势不稳带来的地缘政治和供应链挑战，本年度泰国食品出口总额预计将同比下降 7.3% 至 1.4 万亿铢。这可能是泰国食品出口量五年来触及的最低点。中东冲突不仅影响了货运物流，也导致了主要出口市场的消费需求萎缩，这对作为“世界厨房”的泰国农业经济构成较大压力。
title_cn: 受中东冲突博弈影响，泰国今年食品出口预计将下跌 7%

title: 总理阿努廷 Anutin 视腐败为首要挑战，誓言提升泰国廉洁排名
desc: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has launched a renewed anti-corruption drive to lift Thailand's standing in the Corruption Perceptions Index (CPI), after the country's 2025 ranking fell near the bottom of both Asean and global tables.
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has launched a renewed anti-corruption drive to lift Thailand's standing in the Corruption Perceptions Index (CPI), after the country's 2025 ranking fell near the bottom of both Asean and global tables.
summary_cn: 鉴于泰国在 2025 年清廉印象指数（CPI）排行榜上跌至东盟及全球低位，现任总理阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）近日发起了新一轮声势浩大的反腐运动。他明确表示腐败是影响国家形象和投资信心的燃眉之急，并将通过加强行政透明度和从严问责，力求在任期内显著改善泰国的廉政地位，重振外界合作信心。
title_cn: 总理阿努廷 Anutin 视腐败为首要挑战，誓言提升泰国廉洁排名

title: 财政部长艾尼提 Ekniti：无视市场规律人为压低能源价或引发“经济双重打击”
desc: Any attempt to keep energy prices artificially low, in defiance of market mechanisms, could trigger a double whammy within the country, says Finance Minister Ekniti Nitithanprapas.
desc_original: Any attempt to keep energy prices artificially low, in defiance of market mechanisms, could trigger a double whammy within the country, says Finance Minister Ekniti Nitithanprapas.
summary_cn: 泰国财政部长艾尼提（Ekniti Nitithanprapas）近日阐述了新的政策立场，警告称若无视市场规律、通过行政干预过度压低能源价格，可能引发财政赤字与市场扭曲的“双重打击”。他主张采取更为可持续的调控方式，以平衡民众生活成本与国家财政健康，这也是新政府在处理燃油和电力补贴问题上的关键信号。
title_cn: 财政部长艾尼提 Ekniti：无视市场规律人为压低能源价或引发“经济双重打击”

title: 泰国石油零售（OR）在油价波动中加速扩展电动汽车（EV）服务
desc: PTT Oil and Retail Business Plc (OR) is channeling funds into electric vehicle (EV) services to expand its electric mobility business amid rising concerns among motorists over volatile global oil prices.
desc_original: PTT Oil and Retail Business Plc (OR) is channeling funds into electric vehicle (EV) services to expand its electric mobility business amid rising concerns among motorists over volatile global oil prices.
summary_cn: 泰国石油零售股份公司（PTT Oil and Retail Business Plc，简称OR）正加大对电动汽车（EV）服务的资金投入，旨在全球油价波动剧烈导致车主担忧的背景下，加速布局电动交通业务。该公司计划通过扩展充电桩网络及相关配套服务，减少对燃油零售的依赖，顺应泰国的绿色能源转型趋势。
title_cn: 泰国石油零售（OR）在油价波动中加速扩展电动汽车（EV）服务

title: 外卖平台 Line Man 预警：若燃油价格继续上涨将加收配送附加费
desc: Line Man Wongnai is preparing for a worst-case energy crisis by considering delivery surcharges on consumers if fuel prices rise by another 9-10 baht.
desc_original: Line Man Wongnai is preparing for a worst-case energy crisis by considering delivery surcharges on consumers if fuel prices rise by another 9-10 baht.
summary_cn: 泰国知名生活服务平台 Line Man Wongnai 正针对能源危机做最坏打算。公司表示，若燃油价格在当前基础上再上涨 9-10 泰铢，将考虑向消费者加收“配送附加费”以缓解成本压力。这反映了泰国物流与配送行业在能源成本激增下的生存压力，或将直接影响常住居民的日常生活支出。
title_cn: 外卖平台 Line Man 预警：若燃油价格继续上涨将加收配送附加费

title: 泰铢持续走强恐打击旅游业收入，专家预警 30 关口
desc: The tourism sector could lose 15-17% of revenue if the baht strengthens beyond 30 per US dollar, according to a former governor of the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT).
desc_original: The tourism sector could lose 15-17% of revenue if the baht strengthens beyond 30 per US dollar, according to a former governor of the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT).
summary_cn: 泰国国家旅游局（TAT）前局长发出预警，若泰铢对美元汇率升破 30 关口，泰国旅游业可能损失 15% 至 17% 的收入。泰铢走强会导致外国游客的消费能力下降，降低泰国作为廉价旅游目的地吸引力，对正处于恢复期的泰国经济增长核心引擎造成负面冲击。
title_cn: 泰铢持续走强恐打击旅游业收入，专家预警 30 关口

title: 泰国私企界敦促新内阁采取紧急经济行动
desc: Business leaders have welcomed Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul's new cabinet, expressing hope for a more effective response to a range of economic challenges, from surging fuel prices to broader issues affecting the Thai economy.
desc_original: Business leaders have welcomed Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul's new cabinet, expressing hope for a more effective response to a range of economic challenges, from surging fuel prices to broader issues affecting the Thai economy.
summary_cn: 泰国商界领袖对阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）总理领导的新内阁表示欢迎，并敦促政府立即采取行动应对一系列经济挑战。企业界期望新内阁能更有效地解决燃料价格飙升、生活成本上涨以及影响泰国整体竞争力的结构性问题。这一动向预示着未来几个月泰国可能出台新的经济刺激政策。
title_cn: 泰国私企界敦促新内阁采取紧急经济行动

title: 他信进入假释候选名单，最快 5 月获准释放
desc: Former prime minister Thaksin Shinawatra is among 10 inmates approved at the prison level for parole review, with a possible release under electronic monitoring in May.
desc_original: Former prime minister Thaksin Shinawatra is among 10 inmates approved at the prison level for parole review, with a possible release under electronic monitoring in May.
summary_cn: 前总理他信（Thaksin Shinawatra）已进入监狱部门报批的 10 人假释审核名单之列。若获通过，他信最早可能于今年 5 月在佩戴电子监控设备（EM）的条件下获得假释释放。此举被视为泰国政坛的风向标，可能对当前的政治格局及各方势力的制衡产生重大影响。
title_cn: 他信进入假释候选名单，最快 5 月获准释放

title: Bangkok Water Festival returns
desc: The Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) has announced the return of the "Bangkok Water Festival 2026", to be held from April 11–15 under the theme "Sanook Sanan Songkran Ban Chan", with a pre-festival launch scheduled for April 4 in Bangkok.
desc_original: The Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) has announced the return of the "Bangkok Water Festival 2026", to be held from April 11–15 under the theme "Sanook Sanan Songkran Ban Chan", with a pre-festival launch scheduled for April 4 in Bangkok.
title_cn: 曼谷泼水文化节回归，4月11日起全城尽享泰式狂欢
summary_cn: 泰国国家旅游局（TAT）宣布“2026年曼谷水文化节（Bangkok Water Festival）”将于4月11日至15日举行，主题为“我家欢度泼水节”。此活动旨在延续宋干节文化传统，并计划于4月4日在曼谷举行预热启动仪式。对于在泰华人及游客，这是体验曼谷传统庆典的重要窗口。
